title: justicia hilaris
intro: Justicia hilaris is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the Hairy Justicia. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. The leaves and stems of Justicia hilaris are often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal benefits.
